title: Shin Seifu Asougelion Gekijouban Shina Shuurai
display_title: Shin Seifu Asougelion Gekijouban Shina Shuurai
wikitext:
[]: Shin Seifu Asougelion Gekijouban Shina Shuurai             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Dec 04, 2008 11:14 am Being dec. 4th, Asuka's and Miyamuu's BD, I'd like to give our good mod Tines [REDACTED] and the rest of the not so free people, a present. ---- Anyways, here's a MAD movie about Asou Tarou, done a-la Death and Rebirth, with "Rozen" Asou doing the ATF (Asou Tarou Field) on the UN, the Japanese Diet, against other politicians, etc... Enjoy: http://jp.youtube.com/watch?v=ezp_6W0s-G0 Or at its sauce http://gigazine.net/index.php?/news/comments/20081201_asogelion/ You really do want to be banned, don't you?

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Thu Dec 04, 2008 11:28 am So it is. Asuka is 7 today!

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Dec 04, 2008 2:34 pm Happy Birthday! The video was amazing ^__^ Happen to notice on "That Board" as you like to call it that there are a lot of Birthday pictures.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Thu Dec 04, 2008 5:14 pm What is Golgo 13 doing in there??? (Ah, the man who have taken '....' to a new level. Kukukuku....)

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Dec 05, 2008 6:21 am Not even Duke Tougou could scratch Rozen Asou... that's being GAR!

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Fri Dec 05, 2008 7:28 am If Duke Tougou cannot scratch Aso, then there is a future for Japan. Oh goodie good good.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Dec 05, 2008 8:52 am Unless you're an Ainu or burakumin... or chinese.... or... or...

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Fri Dec 05, 2008 4:51 pm Either way, Aso in his AT field... The saviour, or the damnation I wonder...

[]:             Quote Post by pat457 » Fri Dec 12, 2008 9:49 pm The Imperialist wrote: Either way, Aso in his AT field... The saviour, or the damnation I wonder...

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Sat Dec 27, 2008 5:19 pm There are no such thing as overkill. Overkill is very much encouraged.
